base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_lives_counter — a ui (hud_readout) from 1980 pac man. Stack of yellow Pac-Man life-sprites (chomp-left) at bottom-left corner — placed 16 px from left edge per sheet note. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stack of yellow Pac-Man life-sprites (chomp-left) at bottom-left corner — placed 16 px from left edge per sheet note; one per remaining life beyond the currently-playing one
